title: Grafana Governance Naming Rules
description: Naming conventions and validation patterns for all Grafana resources managed via Crossplane GitOps

dashboard.description: Dashboard names must start with 2-6 uppercase letters (org/team code), followed by a lowercase kebab-case identifier, ending with a semantic version suffix.

error_messages.prefix_missing: Dashboard name must start with 2-6 uppercase letters (org/team code), e.g., 'PLAT'
error_messages.separator_missing: Dashboard name must use a hyphen '-' after the org/team code prefix
error_messages.identifier_invalid: Dashboard identifier portion must use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only
error_messages.version_missing: Dashboard name must end with a semantic version like '-v1.0' or '-v2.3'
error_messages.version_format: Version suffix must be '-v' followed by MAJOR.MINOR digits, e.g., '-v1.0'

dashboard.notes: The version suffix enables side-by-side coexistence of major versions and tracks dashboard evolution.

alert_rule.description: Alert rule names must contain org/team code, a domain/service code in uppercase, a severity level (CRIT/WARN/INFO), and a lowercase kebab-case description.

error_messages.prefix_missing: Alert rule name must start with 2-6 uppercase letters (org/team code)
error_messages.domain_missing: Alert rule name must include a domain/service code in uppercase after the org prefix, e.g., 'SVC', 'API', 'INFRA'
error_messages.severity_invalid: Severity must be one of: CRIT, WARN, INFO
error_messages.description_invalid: Description portion must use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only

severity_mapping.CRIT: critical - immediate action required, triggers PagerDuty
severity_mapping.WARN: warning - attention needed, triggers Slack notification
severity_mapping.INFO: informational - for awareness only, triggers email digest

alert_rule.notes: Severity level in the name must match the 'severity' label value (mapped accordingly).

folder.description: Folder titles follow a hierarchical slash-separated path. Root segment is the org/team code in uppercase; subsequent segments start with uppercase and use alphanumeric characters.

error_messages.root_invalid: Folder path root must be 2-6 uppercase letters (org/team code)
error_messages.segment_case: Each path segment after the root must start with an uppercase letter
error_messages.segment_chars: Path segments may only contain letters and digits (no hyphens or spaces)
error_messages.separator: Path segments must be separated by forward slashes '/' only

folder.notes: Folder hierarchy maps to alert routing tiers: RealTime, NearRealTime, Standard, Degraded, Report.

datasource.description: DataSource names use a DS- prefix followed by type, service identifier, and optional environment suffix.

error_messages.type_invalid: DataSource type must be lowercase letters only (e.g., prom, loki, tempo, postgres)
error_messages.identifier_invalid: Service identifier must use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens
error_messages.env_invalid: Environment suffix must be one of: prod, stg, dev (or omitted)

organization.description: Organization names start with 'ORG-' prefix, followed by a PascalCase team/department name, ending with a 4-digit year.

error_messages.name_case: Organization team/department name must start with uppercase letter (PascalCase)
error_messages.year_missing: Organization name must end with a 4-digit year, e.g., '-2025'
error_messages.year_format: Year suffix must be exactly 4 digits

organization.notes: Year suffix enables organization versioning for annual restructuring cycles.

team.description: Team names start with 'TEAM-' prefix, followed by a 2-6 uppercase letter org/department code, then a lowercase kebab-case team identifier.

error_messages.code_invalid: Department code must be 2-6 uppercase letters
error_messages.identifier_invalid: Team identifier must use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only

metadata.enforcement: OPA policy + GitHub Actions CI validation
